skills.name: Run + Hurdle to Two-Foot Jump
crit: Runs into the hurdle without stopping or stutter-stepping.
Hurdles off of one foot to land on both feet
Arms by ears in jump

skills.name: Front Support Forward Roll (with spot)
crit: Unassisted front support for 3 sec
Looks at belly while rolling
Hands stay on bar until roll is complete

skills.name: Tuck Hang
crit: Holds for 3 sec
Knees above belly button
Arms by  ears

skills.name: Walk Across Low Beam (Unassisted)
crit: Chest up with arms out to the side
Steps one foot in front of the other (heel to toe)
Walks across the beam without wobbles

skills.name: Bear Crawl on Line
crit: Hands on the line
Feet on the line
Straight legs

skills.name: Backward Walk with Coach
crit: Chest up with arms out to the side
Steps one foot behind the other (heel to toe)
Keeps eyes forward while walking backward

skills.name: Monkey Jump Over Panel Mat
crit: Turns hands towards "favorite foot"
Jumps over the panel mat without touching it
Starts and finshes with arms up

skills.name: Backward Handstand Walk Up (5 sec hold)
crit: Walks feet up the wall until hips are above shoulders.
Straight arms covering ears
Straight back

skills.name: Forward Roll Down Wedge
crit: Starts in a pencil shape
Eyes on belly
Stands up without using hands

skills.name: Tabletop Hold
crit: Holds for 5 sec
Back flat, no sagging hips
Fingers facing feet

skills.name: Safety
crit: Follows directions
Stays with the group
Keeps hands to self

skills.name: Run + Hurdle + Straight Jump to Panel Mat
crit: Run accelerates into the hurdle with no stutter-steps
Hurdles off one foot and hits the board with two feet
Arms down on the springboard, up in the air

skills.name: Pullover (with Mat)
crit: Keeps chin at the bar while walking feet up the mat until feet are above the bar
Shifts hands with fingers forward to finish in front support
Holds front support — pushing down on the bar, belly off the bar — for 3 seconds.

skills.name: Forward Roll
crit: From front support, tips forward and completes the full rotation without letting go of the bar
Feet and knees together
Lands on feet with control — no dropping or crashing down

skills.name: Front Support (5 sec hold)
crit: Straight arms
Belly in and back rounded
Straight legs and pointed toes in front of the bar

skills.name: Walk Across Medium Beam (Unassisted)
crit: Chest up with arms out to the side
Steps one foot in front of the other (heel to toe)
Walks across the beam without wobbles

skills.name: Lever (Floor)
crit: Starts and finishes in a lunge without wobbles
Back leg stays straight
Arms by ears

skills.name: Backward Walk on Low Beam
crit: Chest up with arms out to the side
Steps one foot behind the other (heel to toe)
Keeps eyes forward while walking backward

skills.name: Cartwheel to Lunge
crit: Starts with favorite foot in front and finishes with opposite foot in front
Straight legs
Legs pass through vertical

skills.name: Lunge to Handstand (Mat Supported)
crit: Starts and finishes in a lunge
Straight legs and feet together at vertical
Straight line from hands to toes

skills.name: Forward Roll
crit: Continuous movement in the roll
Feet and knees together
Stands up without using hands

skills.name: Bridge (Feet Elevated)
crit: Pushes up without moving hands or feet
Straight arms by ears
Holds for 3 sec

skills.name: Safety
crit: Follows directions
Stays with the group
Keeps hands to self

skills.name: Straight Jump to Resi
crit: Run accelerates into the hurdle
Arms down on the board, up in the air
Straight body and legs in the air

skills.name: Handstand Flatback
crit: Feet come together at vertical handstand
Straight line from hands to toes at vertical
Lands flat on the mat as one piece

skills.name: Kick Pullover
crit: Chin stays at the bar until toes come over
Shifts hands with fingers forward to finish in front support
Straight legs throughout the skill

skills.name: Cast
crit: Straight arms throughout the skill
Legs straight and together
Demonstrates straight line from shoulders to toes

skills.name: Front Support Hold → Forward Roll Down
crit: Holds front support with straight arms
Chin to chest
Legs straight and together, lowers slowly to a hang

skills.name: Beam Mount
crit: Jumps to front support with straight arms
Straight leg swings over without touching the beam
Stands up with arms by ears

skills.name: Lever
crit: Arms by ears throughout
Straight line from fingers to back foot throughout
Back leg stays straight

skills.name: Relevé Walk
crit: Heels stay off the beam the entire walk
Walks with straight legs
Chest up with arms out to the side

skills.name: Straight Jump
crit: Arms swing up as feet leave the beam and down to sides on the landing
Toes pointed in the air
Lands in the same spot it started

skills.name: Straight Jump Dismount
crit: Arms swing up as feet leave the beam
Straight line from fingers to toes in the air
Sticks landing with hands in front, knees bent (safe landing position)

skills.name: Handstand
crit: Feet come together at vertical
Straight line from hands to toes
Straight legs in the air/arms stay by ears

skills.name: Cartwheel
crit: Legs pass through vertical
Second hand turned in
Arms stay by ears
Legs straight throughout
Finishes in a lunge with opposite leg in front.

skills.name: Backward Roll
crit: Rolls with fingers pointing to shoulders
Continuous movement in the roll
Feet and knees together throughout

skills.name: Bridge (5 sec hold)
crit: Straight arms in the bridge
Head between the arms
Feet flat and together

skills.name: Straight Jump to Resi
crit: Run accelerates into the hurdle
Arms down on the board, up in the air
Straight body and legs in the air

skills.name: Handstand Flatback
crit: Feet come together at vertical handstand
Straight line from hands to toes at vertical
Lands flat on the mat as one piece

skills.name: Kick Pullover
crit: Chin stays at the bar until toes come over
Shifts hands with fingers forward to finish in front support
Straight legs throughout the skill

skills.name: Cast
crit: Straight arms throughout the skill
Legs straight and together
Demonstrates straight line from shoulders to toes

skills.name: Front Support Hold → Forward Roll Down
crit: Holds front support with straight arms
Chin to chest
Legs straight and together, lowers slowly to a hang

skills.name: Beam Mount
crit: Jumps to front support with straight arms
Straight leg swings over without touching the beam
Stands up with arms by ears

skills.name: Lever
crit: Arms by ears throughout
Straight line from fingers to back foot throughout
Back leg stays straight

skills.name: Relevé Walk
crit: Heels stay off the beam the entire walk
Walks with straight legs
Chest up with arms out to the side

skills.name: Straight Jump
crit: Arms swing up as feet leave the beam and down to sides on the landing
Toes pointed in the air
Lands in the same spot it started

skills.name: Straight Jump Dismount
crit: Arms swing up as feet leave the beam
Straight line from fingers to toes in the air
Sticks landing with hands in front, knees bent (safe landing position)

skills.name: Handstand
crit: Feet come together at vertical
Straight line from hands to toes
Straight legs in the air/arms stay by ears

skills.name: Cartwheel
crit: Legs pass through vertical
Second hand turned in
Arms stay by ears
Legs straight throughout
Finishes in a lunge with opposite leg in front.

skills.name: Backward Roll
crit: Rolls with fingers pointing to shoulders
Continuous movement in the roll
Feet and knees together throughout

skills.name: Bridge (5 sec hold)
crit: Straight arms in the bridge
Head between the arms
Feet flat and together

skills.name: Handstand Flatback on Resi
crit: Arms down on the board, up in the air
Straight line from hands to toes at handstand
Lands flat as one piece

skills.name: Chin-Up Pullover
crit: Pulls chin to the bar (bar min forehead height)
Feet leave the floor at the same time
Legs straight and together throughout

skills.name: Cast Back Hip Circle
crit: Straight arms as shoulders lean backwards
Bar stays against the thighs the entire circle
Eyes on toes throughout the skill

skills.name: Cast Off Dismount
crit: Straight arms throughout the cast
Shoulders over the bar in cast before pushing away
Cast 45 below horizontal

skills.name: Roll Down to Chin Hang
crit: Chin finishes above the bar
Holds tucked chin hang for 5 sec
Feet and knees together throughout

skills.name: Pivot Turn
crit: Stays in relevé lock the entire turn
Arms stay overhead the entire turn
Straight legs

skills.name: Vertical Handstand
crit: Feet come together at vertical
Straight line from hands to toes
Arms stay by ears

skills.name: Side Handstand Dismount
crit: Holds handstand for 1 sec before falling
Maintains straight line from shoulder to toes during dismount
Shoulders over the beam from handstand to fall

skills.name: Bridge Kickover
crit: Straight arms by ears
Legs stay straight through the split
One step from bridge hold to kickover

skills.name: Round-Off Rebound
crit: Legs together and straight during the snap-down
Hands come off the floor before feet hit
Rebounds up and backward immediately after landing.

skills.name: Straight Arm Backward Roll
crit: Pushes on pinkies at beginning of roll
Arms stay straight during the roll
Finishes in a strong push-up position

skills.name: Half Turn
crit: Arms stay in crown the entire turn
Stays in relevé the entire turn
Toe stays at the knee the entire turn

skills.name: Step Leap
crit: Shows correct preparation for the leap with chest up, arms at sides
Straight legs in the air
Lands in arabesque with front leg bent (1 sec hold)

skills.name: Front Handspring
crit: Hands touch mat/table before body is vertical
Straight body when hands touch mat/table
Straight body after hands leave the mat/table

skills.name: Glide Swing
crit: Jumps to the bar with straight arms
Hips extended at the front of the swing
Returns in the same spot as the start

skills.name: Pullover Cast Back Hip Circle
crit: Cast to 45 degrees below horizontal
Straight arms in back hip circle
Legs straight and together throughout

skills.name: Sole Circle Dismount
crit: Straight legs throughout
Feet rise as they come off of the bar
Body extended before landing

skills.name: Side Handstand 1/4 Turn Dismount
crit: Holds side HS for 1 sec before turning
Keeps body straight during the descent
Straight legs throughout

skills.name: Half Turn
crit: Stays in relevé the entire turn
Arms freeze in crown during the turn
Toe stays at the knee the entire turn
Finishes the turn before stepping forward

skills.name: Split Jump
crit: Straight legs
Minimum 90 degree split
Lands in the same spot it started

skills.name: Cartwheel
crit: Second hand turned in
Head stays between arms
Kicks through vertical with straight legs

skills.name: Back Handspring
crit: Skill travels backwards
Hands hit with open shoulders and hips
Thumbs facing each other
Legs together and straight throughout

skills.name: Front Handspring
crit: Straight arms by ears throughout
Lands in a tight arch
Rebounds forward with straight legs

skills.name: Chassé Split Leap
crit: Toes pointed in chassé
Minimum 120 degree split
Straight legs in the split

skills.name: Full Turn
crit: Arms stay in crown the entire turn
Stays in relevé the entire turn
Toe stays at the knee the entire turn

skills.name: Back Walkover
crit: Front leg lifts as hands reach back
Straight legs throughout
Arms stay by ears
